meta.name: Revenue Health Monitor
meta.description: Track MRR, ARR, churn rate, expansion, and contraction. Alert on revenue health deviations from targets.

parameters.content:
## 22 — Revenue Health Monitor

**Required:**
- REVENUE_SHEET_ID: columns month, mrr, new_mrr, expansion_mrr, contraction_mrr, churn_mrr, customers
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO
- REVENUE_MRR_TARGET: target MoM growth % (e.g. 5)

**Schedule:** 1st of each month at 09:00
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 💰 Revenue Health {{ $json.month }}: MRR ${{ $json.mrr }} ({{ $json.health.toUpperCase() }})
